title: 有馬記念の後に・笑顔の花火

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt that they're on equal footing.
Both of them are worthy of representing a
generation of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which means this will come down to one thing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now, Kita! Now!

text_block_list.name: Groove and Brusque
text_block_list.text: Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: GOOO, KITASAN! You can do this! You can win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Kitasan Black! Kitasan Black has passed the
finish line first and won!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's claimed the most astounding victory on the
final stage of the year! Three cheers for our star!
She's won it for us regular folks!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I... won?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I won. I won! I WON! Finally... I ran my first serious
race against Dia, and I...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I WOOON!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita... I lost...
choice_data_list: That was a great race, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh... Thank you, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I... I meant to close the gap between us. That's
what I was supposed to do!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So why... why did you feel so far ahead?
choice_data_list:
Maybe... it's how many people's dreams are
pushing Kitasan Black on.

Maybe... it's how many people's dreams are
pushing Kitasan Black on.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Dreams?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, I remember hearing a
lot of cheering for Kita during the race...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Particularly from those who shouted with every
fiber of their being...
choice_data_list:
Those were the fans who have supported her
every step of the way.

Those were the fans who have supported her
every step of the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All Umamusume get stronger by running
alongside their rivals. In Kitasan Black's case,
however...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She not only had a rival staying astride with her,
but fans who adored her from the very beginning
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If enough of them gather together, even the
faintest glow in the night can become a roaring
bonfire of support.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Thank you... so much...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks to you, I... I—
choice_data_list: Take a look at the stands.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The stands? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There she sees...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Kitasan Black! Thank you, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing! You're the best... You're
simply the best!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Oh my gosh... Everyone's smiling... They're
all so happy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I did it... I finally did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All those wishes gave her the strength to run, and
to aim for her own dream beyond this victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sheer scale of her earnest desire to see the
fans smile is what made Kitasan Black win.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Can you... pinkie swear with me again?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Promise that this won't be the last time we race. I
still want to chase you down, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course, Dia! I still want to run so many more
races with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They exchange an eternal promise. Then, Kitasan
Black turns back to the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming out today, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Did you have fun?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Glad to hear it! It was a long time coming, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I was finally able to run a race that
made you all smile.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This is what festivals are all about! This is what
I've been wanting to do! But...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've finally accomplished my goal, I
know what I want to do next.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the end. As long as I set my mind to it, I
can throw an even bigger festival! But you know
what?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't do it alone. I need even more fans to cheer
me on and support me through everything!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So I'm going to put my next plan into motion from
today onward, but not just as Kita the clutch
captain or Kita the festival guru.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep trying to catch up with my
upperclassmen, guiding my younger peers toward
success and bringing everyone together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to create an even more grandiose stage
for everyone. But to do that, I've got to get lots
and lots stronger!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Strong enough to carry the Twinkle Series
through a big, big parade!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Will you come with me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Will you help me, the festival guru, get everyone
hyped up?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the way she fires up a crowd is refreshing.
This race might just have been the thing that
helped Kitasan Black truly come into her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether she's the clutch captain or the festival
guru, Kitasan Black is a true leader who's there to
lead even the most experienced Umamusume
forward.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
After this will be our concert! Don't worry! I'll sing
all my songs to the very end, just like how I run all
my races to the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, everyone! Let's put our hearts and souls
into this alongside our dear friends!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's winning concert time! Let's take it up to
eleven!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom, boom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The joyful cheers that follow shake the ground.
It's as if the cheers celebrating the festival of the
people since ancient times never stopped.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And standing amidst all the countless smiles is
Kitasan Black, now the most beloved
Umamusume in everyone's heart.
